title: Beyond the All-in-One Agent: Benchmarking Role-Specialized Multi-Agent Collaboration in Enterprise Workflows

paper.extraction_status: Full 45-page immutable v1 PDF extracted successfully. The extraction has 194136 bytes, 193196 characters, and 2086 non-empty lines. Title/abstract, task-generation appendix, prompts/hyperparameters, result discussion, limitations, and final page were inspected for continuity. Metadata contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

officiality_basis: The immutable v1 PDF explicitly links both https://github.com/yutao1024/EntCollabBench and https://huggingface.co/datasets/Kirito-Lab/EntCollabBench on page 1. This establishes both as paper-linked official sources; it does not establish that later revisions are identical to paper-time artifacts.

dataset_release.timing_note: The pinned dataset revision is four days after arXiv v1 submission and must be treated as a post-v1 release, not proven paper-time data. Its API tags itself with arxiv:2605.08761 and exposes the four task files and two resource archives named by the paper-linked dataset card.
dataset_release.static_validation: All four JSON files parsed as lists with exactly 20, 80, 40, and 160 records (300 total). Both ZIP archives passed unzip -t. No released code was executed.

code_release.timing_note: Observed HEAD is five days after arXiv v1 submission and is not treated as exact paper-time implementation code.
code_release.inspection_boundary: Archive integrity and manifest were checked without executing untrusted code. Deep implementation inspection remains part of the queued review.

claim_boundary: This acquisition creates verifiable local primary-source and release evidence only. It is not a deep review and makes no claim about task validity, permission enforcement, delegation quality, state-verifier completeness, policy authority, professional realism, safety, reproducibility, capability, or deployment readiness.
